settings.custom_liquid:
<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
        const customSelect = document.querySelector('.custom-select--currency');

        if (customSelect) {
            const buttonText = customSelect.querySelector('.custom-select--text').innerText.trim();
            const pathList = location.pathname.split('/')
            const productName = pathList[pathList.length-1]
            if (buttonText === 'Netherlands (EUR €)' && productName === 'nl-steelstofzuiger-x7') {
                    console.log('change html lang to fr')
                    const htmlElement = document.documentElement;
                    htmlElement.lang = 'nl';
            } else {
                console.log('not match',buttonText);
            }
        } else {
            console.log('.custom-select--currency not found');
        }
    });
</script>
